next_action.message:
**Subject: Action Required – Claim CLM-005 (Policy AUT-6678102)**

Dear Valued Customer,

Thank you for your patience as we work through your claim, CLM-005. We want to ensure everything is processed as smoothly as possible, and we need your help clarifying two items.

**1. Finance Agreement from Bank of America Auto**
To process your GAP coverage and confirm your loan payoff amount, we need an official finance agreement or payoff statement from Bank of America Auto showing your outstanding balance and account details. We understand this document may have been in your vehicle. Please contact Bank of America Auto directly to request a replacement copy. Alternatively, if you'd prefer, we're happy to reach out to them on your behalf — simply let us know.

**2. Date of Loss Confirmation**
Our records currently show a date of loss of **03/28/2026**, however, police report LPD-2026-00531 and your own records indicate **03/22/2026**. Could you please confirm the correct date so we can update our files accordingly?

To move your claim forward, please reply to this email or upload any documents through our secure customer portal at your earliest convenience.

We truly appreciate your cooperation and are here if you have any questions.

Warm regards,
Claims Support Team
